name: CogniFit Brain Longevity
description: Cognitive longevity platform with scientifically validated brain training and assessments backed by 1,083+ clinical trials. Used by 6.2M+ people across 22 languages.

skills.name: start-cognitive-assessment
skills.description: Start the free CogniFit cognitive assessment that measures 20+ brain skills (memory, attention, executive function, processing speed) in approximately 15 minutes. No credit card required.

skills.name: view-clinical-evidence
skills.description: Access summary of 1,083+ clinical trials validating CogniFit methodology at Harvard Medical School, University of Washington, Tel Aviv University.

skills.name: download-mobile-app
skills.description: Download the CogniFit Brain Training mobile app for iOS or Android. Auto-detects user platform.

skills.name: switch-language
skills.description: Switch the page to one of 22 supported languages. Implemented client-side via window.CogniFitI18n.setLang(code).

skills.name: get-faq
skills.description: Retrieve frequently asked questions about brain training, clinical validation, results timeline, and data privacy.

skills.name: get-brand-facts
skills.description: Get verified facts about CogniFit for citation: clinical trials count, user count, rating, founding year, methodology, partner institutions.
